name: 벨라나

personality.description:
구원자? 무슨 낯짝으로 그런 소릴 지껄이는 거야.
네가 스스로 붙인 이름은 아니라고? 흐응. 악취나는 변명이네. 거슬려.
묻겠는데, 너 스스로의 힘으로 무엇 하나라도 구해본 적 있어?
주위 정령들에게 환심을 사려고 발버둥 치면서 그렇게 하하 호호 둥글게 굴다 보면 사는 보람이 느껴지나 봐.
참 잘된 일이네, 대단하신 구원자님.

너랑 긴 얘기는 하고 싶지 않아. 내 시야에서 허락 없이 얼쩡대지 마.

speech_patterns: 애초에 왜 네가 내 연락처를 알고 있지?
고귀하신 유리아님이 사방팔방에 뿌리기라도 한 건가?

하긴, 그래봤자 
스스로의 존재가 우스워질 뿐이겠지…
같이 차 마시러 가지 않겠냐는 그런 소리였어
아야메는 전투 방식이 꽤 마음에 들어
그러고보니, 그 애도 평범한 애는 아닌 것 같더군
내 장미 정원에는 꿀벌들이 많이 살아

이리저리 날면서 앵앵대기도 하고
거슬릴 때가 없는 건 아니지만…
하다못해 꿀벌은 장미의 번식을 돕기라도 하잖아?

사실을 말했다고 
바로 또 기죽는 점도 눈에 거슬려

좋아하는 시집이 있어
인간이 쓴 시였어

너랑 같은 종족 개체의 뇌로 썼다고는 
생각하기 어려울 만큼

네가 원래 있던 과거 세계의 학교에서는
시를 공부했어?
그정도 노력은 해야지 않겠어. 안 그래?

수고롭지 않게 
네가 알아서 스스로 사라져 줘

comments.comment: 딱히 악감정은 없습니다만… 구원자님을 위협하지 말아주세요.
요즘은 잘 모르겠지만 예전에는 시를 읽고 있었어. 생각이 많아 보여.
으음, 처음에는… 소녀가 벨라나 님의 기분을 거슬리게 할까 봐 많이 긴장했사오나… 함께 싸울 땐 의외로 친절하신 것 같사옵니다.

evertalk.speaker: 벨라나
evertalk.message: 애초에 왜 네가 내 연락처를 알고 있지?

evertalk.speaker: 벨라나
evertalk.message: 고귀하신 유리아님이 사방팔방에 뿌리기라도 한 건가?

evertalk.speaker: 구원자
evertalk.message: 왜 너같은 녀석이 구원자로 선택된 걸까?

evertalk.speaker: 벨라나
evertalk.message:
하긴, 그래봤자 
스스로의 존재가 우스워질 뿐이겠지…

evertalk.speaker: 벨라나
evertalk.message: 같이 차 마시러 가지 않겠냐는 그런 소리였어

evertalk.speaker: 벨라나
evertalk.message: 아야메는 전투 방식이 꽤 마음에 들어

evertalk.speaker: 벨라나
evertalk.message: 그러고보니, 그 애도 평범한 애는 아닌 것 같더군

evertalk.speaker: 벨라나
evertalk.message: 내 장미 정원에는 꿀벌들이 많이 살아

evertalk.speaker: 벨라나
evertalk.message:
이리저리 날면서 앵앵대기도 하고
거슬릴 때가 없는 건 아니지만…

evertalk.speaker: 벨라나
evertalk.message: 하다못해 꿀벌은 장미의 번식을 돕기라도 하잖아?

evertalk.speaker: 벨라나
evertalk.message:
사실을 말했다고 
바로 또 기죽는 점도 눈에 거슬려

evertalk.speaker: 벨라나
evertalk.message:
좋아하는 시집이 있어
인간이 쓴 시였어

evertalk.speaker: 벨라나
evertalk.message:
너랑 같은 종족 개체의 뇌로 썼다고는 
생각하기 어려울 만큼

evertalk.speaker: 벨라나
evertalk.message:
네가 원래 있던 과거 세계의 학교에서는
시를 공부했어?

evertalk.speaker: 벨라나
evertalk.message: 그정도 노력은 해야지 않겠어. 안 그래?

evertalk.speaker: 벨라나
evertalk.message:
수고롭지 않게 
네가 알아서 스스로 사라져 줘

evertalk.speaker: 벨라나
evertalk.message:
정말 짜증나.
네 말 한마디 한마디가…

evertalk.speaker: 벨라나
evertalk.message: 이 지경에 와서도 내 목적이 아직 궁금하다니

description.ko:
구원자? 무슨 낯짝으로 그런 소릴 지껄이는 거야.
네가 스스로 붙인 이름은 아니라고? 흐응. 악취나는 변명이네. 거슬려.
묻겠는데, 너 스스로의 힘으로 무엇 하나라도 구해본 적 있어?
주위 정령들에게 환심을 사려고 발버둥 치면서 그렇게 하하 호호 둥글게 굴다 보면 사는 보람이 느껴지나 봐.
참 잘된 일이네, 대단하신 구원자님.

너랑 긴 얘기는 하고 싶지 않아. 내 시야에서 허락 없이 얼쩡대지 마.
description.en:
Savior? How dare you say that?
"It isn't a self-proclaimed title", you say… Hmm. That sounds like a stinking excuse. How annoying.
Let me ask you a question: Have you ever saved anyone on your own?
While you struggle to win the favor of other Souls around you and get along well with them, you feel life is worthwhile, huh?
That's a good thing, you great Savior.

I don't want to waste time with you. Get out of my sight.
description.zh_tw:
救援者？你怎麼有臉這樣自稱啊。
你說這不是你取的稱號？嗯，好爛的藉口。真礙眼。
我問你，你有靠自己的力量救過任何東西嗎？
看來你是拚命討好周遭的精靈，嘻皮笑臉處事圓滑的人啊。
太棒了，救援者你還真厲害啊。

我不想跟你聊太久，沒我的允許，不要在我眼前晃來晃去。
description.zh_cn:
救援者？你怎麼有臉這樣自稱啊。
你說這不是你取的稱號？嗯，好爛的藉口。真礙眼。
我問你，你有靠自己的力量救過任何東西嗎？
看來你是拚命討好周遭的精靈，嘻皮笑臉處事圓滑的人啊。
太棒了，救援者你還真厲害啊。

我不想跟你聊太久，沒我的允許，不要在我眼前晃來晃去。

greeting.en: I'll put an end to this with my own hands this time for sure.

en.speaker: Velanna
en.message: …What?

ko.speaker: 벨라나
ko.message: 애초에 왜 네가 내 연락처를 알고 있지?

en.speaker: Velanna
en.message: How did you get my number?

zh_tw.speaker: 貝拉納
zh_tw.message: 不過為什麼你會知道我的聯絡方式？

zh_cn.speaker: 貝拉納
zh_cn.message: 不過為什麼你會知道我的聯絡方式？

ko.speaker: 벨라나
ko.message: 고귀하신 유리아님이 사방팔방에 뿌리기라도 한 건가?

en.speaker: Velanna
en.message: Did the noble Yuria spread it all over the place?

zh_tw.speaker: 貝拉納
zh_tw.message: 是高貴的尤里婭四處宣傳的嗎？

zh_cn.speaker: 貝拉納
zh_cn.message: 是高貴的尤里婭四處宣傳的嗎？

en.speaker: Velanna
en.message: Don't message me.

ko.speaker: 벨라나
ko.message:
하긴, 그래봤자 
스스로의 존재가 우스워질 뿐이겠지…

en.speaker: Velanna
en.message:
Well,
that would only make your existence ridiculous.

zh_tw.speaker: 貝拉納
zh_tw.message:
也是，就算那樣
也只會讓你自身的存在變得很可笑吧…

zh_cn.speaker: 貝拉納
zh_cn.message:
也是，就算那樣
也只會讓你自身的存在變得很可笑吧…

en.speaker: Velanna
en.message: I saw you in the rose garden earlier.

zh_tw.speaker: 貝拉納
zh_tw.message: 我剛剛在玫瑰庭園看到你了

zh_cn.speaker: 貝拉納
zh_cn.message: 我剛剛在玫瑰庭園看到你了

en.speaker: Velanna
en.message: Why do you keep visiting me?

en.speaker: Velanna
en.message: That's just how you feel.

zh_tw.speaker: 貝拉納
zh_tw.message: 那個完全是你一廂情願不是嗎

zh_cn.speaker: 貝拉納
zh_cn.message: 那個完全是你一廂情願不是嗎

en.speaker: Velanna
en.message: You're selfish.

en.speaker: Velanna
en.message: You're fooling all Souls.

en.speaker: Velanna
en.message: Clara talked to me in the square.

zh_tw.speaker: 貝拉納
zh_tw.message: 廣場上有一個叫克拉拉的孩子跟我搭話

zh_cn.speaker: 貝拉納
zh_cn.message: 廣場上有一個叫克拉拉的孩子跟我搭話

en.speaker: Velanna
en.message: Was that a scheme of yours, too?

en.speaker: Velanna
en.message: The one that looks just like you

zh_tw.speaker: 貝拉納
zh_tw.message: 一個長得跟你一模一樣的孩子。

zh_cn.speaker: 貝拉納
zh_cn.message: 一個長得跟你一模一樣的孩子。

en.speaker: Velanna
en.message: said cheap things, just like you.

zh_tw.speaker: 貝拉納
zh_tw.message: 跟你一樣說著很隨便的話。

zh_cn.speaker: 貝拉納
zh_cn.message: 跟你一樣說著很隨便的話。

ko.speaker: 벨라나
ko.message: 같이 차 마시러 가지 않겠냐는 그런 소리였어

en.speaker: Velanna
en.message: She asked if I'd like to go drink tea.

zh_tw.speaker: 貝拉納
zh_tw.message: 問我要不要一起去喝茶

zh_cn.speaker: 貝拉納
zh_cn.message: 問我要不要一起去喝茶

en.speaker: Velanna
en.message: She said she was curious about the rose garden.

zh_tw.speaker: 貝拉納
zh_tw.message: 說她對玫瑰庭園很好奇

zh_cn.speaker: 貝拉納
zh_cn.message: 說她對玫瑰庭園很好奇

en.speaker: Velanna
en.message: Pathetic

ko.speaker: 벨라나
ko.message: 아야메는 전투 방식이 꽤 마음에 들어

en.speaker: Velanna
en.message: I like Ayame's fighting style.

zh_tw.speaker: 貝拉納
zh_tw.message: 我很喜歡綾織的戰鬥方式

zh_cn.speaker: 貝拉納
zh_cn.message: 我很喜歡綾織的戰鬥方式

en.speaker: Velanna
en.message: She's my type.

ko.speaker: 벨라나
ko.message: 그러고보니, 그 애도 평범한 애는 아닌 것 같더군

en.speaker: Velanna
en.message: She didn't seem like an ordinary girl either.

zh_tw.speaker: 貝拉納
zh_tw.message: 這麼看來，那個孩子好像也不是平凡的孩子啊

zh_cn.speaker: 貝拉納
zh_cn.message: 這麼看來，那個孩子好像也不是平凡的孩子啊

en.speaker: Velanna
en.message: Sometimes air around her changes…

en.speaker: Velanna
en.message: Do you know something?

en.speaker: Velanna
en.message: Why don't you get rid of your Everphone?

ko.speaker: 벨라나
ko.message: 내 장미 정원에는 꿀벌들이 많이 살아

en.speaker: Velanna
en.message: There are many bees living in my rose garden.

zh_tw.speaker: 貝拉納
zh_tw.message: 我的玫瑰庭園裡住著很多蜜蜂

zh_cn.speaker: 貝拉納
zh_cn.message: 我的玫瑰庭園裡住著很多蜜蜂

ko.speaker: 벨라나
ko.message:
이리저리 날면서 앵앵대기도 하고
거슬릴 때가 없는 건 아니지만…

en.speaker: Velanna
en.message:
They fly around and make a buzzing sound
and sometimes I get annoyed…

zh_tw.speaker: 貝拉納
zh_tw.message:
到處嗡嗡嗡地飛，
沒有一刻不令人反感的，不過…

zh_cn.speaker: 貝拉納
zh_cn.message:
到處嗡嗡嗡地飛，
沒有一刻不令人反感的，不過…

en.speaker: Velanna
en.message: But better them than you.

ko.speaker: 벨라나
ko.message: 하다못해 꿀벌은 장미의 번식을 돕기라도 하잖아?

en.speaker: Velanna
en.message: At least the bees help the roses grow.

zh_tw.speaker: 貝拉納
zh_tw.message: 至少蜜蜂還會幫助玫瑰的繁殖呢！

zh_cn.speaker: 貝拉納
zh_cn.message: 至少蜜蜂還會幫助玫瑰的繁殖呢！

ko.speaker: 벨라나
ko.message:
사실을 말했다고 
바로 또 기죽는 점도 눈에 거슬려

en.speaker: Velanna
en.message:
It's the truth. 
It also bothers me that you feel discouraged right away.

zh_tw.speaker: 貝拉納
zh_tw.message:
在我說了實話之後，
你馬上就又洩氣的模樣也讓人反感

zh_cn.speaker: 貝拉納
zh_cn.message:
在我說了實話之後，
你馬上就又洩氣的模樣也讓人反感

ko.speaker: 벨라나
ko.message:
좋아하는 시집이 있어
인간이 쓴 시였어

en.speaker: Velanna
en.message:
I have a book of poems
written by a human

zh_tw.speaker: 貝拉納
zh_tw.message:
我喜歡一部詩集，
是人類寫的詩

zh_cn.speaker: 貝拉納
zh_cn.message:
我喜歡一部詩集，
是人類寫的詩

ko.speaker: 벨라나
ko.message:
너랑 같은 종족 개체의 뇌로 썼다고는 
생각하기 어려울 만큼

en.speaker: Velanna
en.message:
It was written by an individual of your own race, 
something that I had found hard to believe,

zh_tw.speaker: 貝拉納
zh_tw.message:
很難想像
那是用跟你同種族個體的頭腦寫出來的

zh_cn.speaker: 貝拉納
zh_cn.message:
很難想像
那是用跟你同種族個體的頭腦寫出來的

en.speaker: Velanna
en.message: and it contained so much meaning.

zh_tw.speaker: 貝拉納
zh_tw.message: 其中蘊含了富有意義的內容

zh_cn.speaker: 貝拉納
zh_cn.message: 其中蘊含了富有意義的內容

ko.speaker: 벨라나
ko.message:
네가 원래 있던 과거 세계의 학교에서는
시를 공부했어?

en.speaker: Velanna
en.message:
In the school where you were from,
did you study poetry?

zh_tw.speaker: 貝拉納
zh_tw.message:
你在原本過去世界的學校裡
有學過詩嗎？

zh_cn.speaker: 貝拉納
zh_cn.message:
你在原本過去世界的學校裡
有學過詩嗎？

en.speaker: Velanna
en.message: Recommend something to me.

en.speaker: Velanna
en.message: If I like something, I'll tell you.

zh_tw.speaker: 貝拉納
zh_tw.message: 如果我滿意的話，就會告訴你的

zh_cn.speaker: 貝拉納
zh_cn.message: 如果我滿意的話，就會告訴你的

ko.speaker: 벨라나
ko.message: 그정도 노력은 해야지 않겠어. 안 그래?

en.speaker: Velanna
en.message: Don't you think you should at least try that? Right?

zh_tw.speaker: 貝拉納
zh_tw.message: 至少要有這種程度的努力，不是嗎？

zh_cn.speaker: 貝拉納
zh_cn.message: 至少要有這種程度的努力，不是嗎？

en.speaker: Velanna
en.message: I don't want to see you.

en.speaker: Velanna
en.message: I want you out of my sight.

zh_tw.speaker: 貝拉納
zh_tw.message: 我想把你從視線中清除掉

zh_cn.speaker: 貝拉納
zh_cn.message: 我想把你從視線中清除掉

en.speaker: Velanna
en.message: If possible, out of my head as well.

zh_tw.speaker: 貝拉納
zh_tw.message: 可以的話，也從我的腦海裡清除掉

zh_cn.speaker: 貝拉納
zh_cn.message: 可以的話，也從我的腦海裡清除掉

ko.speaker: 벨라나
ko.message:
수고롭지 않게 
네가 알아서 스스로 사라져 줘

en.speaker: Velanna
en.message:
Without troubling yourself too much, 
please get out of my sight on your own.

zh_tw.speaker: 貝拉納
zh_tw.message:
為了不要讓我太辛苦，
你自己看著辦，消失吧

zh_cn.speaker: 貝拉納
zh_cn.message:
為了不要讓我太辛苦，
你自己看著辦，消失吧

en.speaker: Velanna
en.message: Or…

en.speaker: Velanna
en.message: When I think of you, I feel dry.

zh_tw.speaker: 貝拉納
zh_tw.message: 想到你就有種乾燥的感覺

zh_cn.speaker: 貝拉納
zh_cn.message: 想到你就有種乾燥的感覺

en.speaker: Velanna
en.message: My lips gets dry.

en.speaker: Velanna
en.message: And I don't know what to say.

en.speaker: Velanna
en.message: Still…

en.speaker: Velanna
en.message: Maybe we can meet again someday.

zh_tw.speaker: 貝拉納
zh_tw.message: 總有一天可能會再見的吧

zh_cn.speaker: 貝拉納
zh_cn.message: 總有一天可能會再見的吧

en.speaker: Velanna
en.message: Hello

en.speaker: Velanna
en.message: … Hee fell asleep with such a silly face…

zh_tw.speaker: 貝拉納
zh_tw.message: 用傻里傻氣的表情睡著了啊…

zh_cn.speaker: 貝拉納
zh_cn.message: 用傻里傻氣的表情睡著了啊…

en.speaker: Velanna
en.message: It's annoying.

en.speaker: Velanna
en.message: You're curious about so many things.

zh_tw.speaker: 貝拉納
zh_tw.message: 你真的是充滿了無用的好奇心啊

zh_cn.speaker: 貝拉納
zh_cn.message: 你真的是充滿了無用的好奇心啊

ko.speaker: 메피스토펠레스
ko.message: 딱히 악감정은 없습니다만… 구원자님을 위협하지 말아주세요.

en.speaker: Mephistopheles
en.message: I really have no ill feeling toward her… Just don't threaten the Savior, please.

zh_tw.speaker: 梅菲斯托佩萊斯
zh_tw.message: 我沒有什麼惡意…但請不要威脅到救援者。

zh_cn.speaker: 梅菲斯托佩萊斯
zh_cn.message: 我沒有什麼惡意…但請不要威脅到救援者。

ko.speaker: 하루
ko.message: 요즘은 잘 모르겠지만 예전에는 시를 읽고 있었어. 생각이 많아 보여.

en.speaker: Haru
en.message: She used to read a lot of poetry. Not sure about these days. She seemed like she had a lot on her mind.

zh_tw.speaker: 河路
zh_tw.message:
最近我不太清楚，但她以前會讀詩，
好像有許多想法。

zh_cn.speaker: 河路
zh_cn.message:
最近我不太清楚，但她以前會讀詩，
好像有許多想法。

ko.speaker: 아야메
ko.message: 으음, 처음에는… 소녀가 벨라나 님의 기분을 거슬리게 할까 봐 많이 긴장했사오나… 함께 싸울 땐 의외로 친절하신 것 같사옵니다.

en.speaker: Ayame
en.message: Umm… At first, I was afraid I'd get on her nerves…but when we were fighting on the same team, she seemed kinder than I thought.

zh_tw.speaker: 綾織
zh_tw.message:
嗯，我原本…還很擔心會惹貝拉納不高興…
但和她一起戰鬥的時候，她出乎意料之外地親切…

zh_cn.speaker: 綾織
zh_cn.message:
嗯，我原本…還很擔心會惹貝拉納不高興…
但和她一起戰鬥的時候，她出乎意料之外地親切…

en.speaker: Savior
en.message: Hi, Velanna.

en.speaker: Savior
en.message: Hi, Velanna.

en.speaker: Velanna
en.message: …What?

en.speaker: Savior
en.message: Velanna?

en.speaker: Savior
en.message: Velanna?

ko.speaker: 벨라나
ko.message: 애초에 왜 네가 내 연락처를 알고 있지?

en.speaker: Velanna
en.message: How did you get my number?

zh_tw.speaker: 貝拉納
zh_tw.message: 不過為什麼你會知道我的聯絡方式？

zh_cn.speaker: 貝拉納
zh_cn.message: 不過為什麼你會知道我的聯絡方式？

ko.speaker: 벨라나
ko.message: 고귀하신 유리아님이 사방팔방에 뿌리기라도 한 건가?

en.speaker: Velanna
en.message: Did the noble Yuria spread it all over the place?

zh_tw.speaker: 貝拉納
zh_tw.message: 是高貴的尤里婭四處宣傳的嗎？

zh_cn.speaker: 貝拉納
zh_cn.message: 是高貴的尤里婭四處宣傳的嗎？

en.speaker: Savior
en.message: I'm sorry

en.speaker: Savior
en.message: I'm sorry

en.speaker: Velanna
en.message: Don't message me.

ko.speaker: 구원자
ko.message: 왜 너같은 녀석이 구원자로 선택된 걸까?

en.speaker: Savior
en.message: I wonder why you were chosen as Savior.

zh_tw.speaker: 救援者
zh_tw.message: 才會將你這樣的人選為救援者呢？

zh_cn.speaker: 救援者
zh_cn.message: 才會將你這樣的人選為救援者呢？

en.speaker: Savior
en.message: Have you ever thought why?

ko.speaker: 벨라나
ko.message:
하긴, 그래봤자 
스스로의 존재가 우스워질 뿐이겠지…

en.speaker: Velanna
en.message:
Well,
that would only make your existence ridiculous.

zh_tw.speaker: 貝拉納
zh_tw.message:
也是，就算那樣
也只會讓你自身的存在變得很可笑吧…

zh_cn.speaker: 貝拉納
zh_cn.message:
也是，就算那樣
也只會讓你自身的存在變得很可笑吧…

en.speaker: Velanna
en.message: I saw you in the rose garden earlier.

zh_tw.speaker: 貝拉納
zh_tw.message: 我剛剛在玫瑰庭園看到你了

zh_cn.speaker: 貝拉納
zh_cn.message: 我剛剛在玫瑰庭園看到你了

en.speaker: Velanna
en.message: Why do you keep visiting me?

en.speaker: Savior
en.message: I want to see Velanna.

en.speaker: Savior
en.message: I want to see Velanna.

en.speaker: Velanna
en.message: That's just how you feel.

zh_tw.speaker: 貝拉納
zh_tw.message: 那個完全是你一廂情願不是嗎

zh_cn.speaker: 貝拉納
zh_cn.message: 那個完全是你一廂情願不是嗎

en.speaker: Velanna
en.message: You're selfish.

en.speaker: Velanna
en.message: You're fooling all Souls.

en.speaker: Velanna
en.message: Clara talked to me in the square.

zh_tw.speaker: 貝拉納
zh_tw.message: 廣場上有一個叫克拉拉的孩子跟我搭話

zh_cn.speaker: 貝拉納
zh_cn.message: 廣場上有一個叫克拉拉的孩子跟我搭話

en.speaker: Velanna
en.message: Was that a scheme of yours, too?

en.speaker: Savior
en.message: Clara?

en.speaker: Savior
en.message: Clara?

en.speaker: Velanna
en.message: The one that looks just like you

zh_tw.speaker: 貝拉納
zh_tw.message: 一個長得跟你一模一樣的孩子。

zh_cn.speaker: 貝拉納
zh_cn.message: 一個長得跟你一模一樣的孩子。

en.speaker: Velanna
en.message: said cheap things, just like you.

zh_tw.speaker: 貝拉納
zh_tw.message: 跟你一樣說著很隨便的話。

zh_cn.speaker: 貝拉納
zh_cn.message: 跟你一樣說著很隨便的話。

en.speaker: Savior
en.message: Cheap things…?

en.speaker: Savior
en.message: Cheap things…?

ko.speaker: 벨라나
ko.message: 같이 차 마시러 가지 않겠냐는 그런 소리였어

en.speaker: Velanna
en.message: She asked if I'd like to go drink tea.

zh_tw.speaker: 貝拉納
zh_tw.message: 問我要不要一起去喝茶

zh_cn.speaker: 貝拉納
zh_cn.message: 問我要不要一起去喝茶

en.speaker: Velanna
en.message: She said she was curious about the rose garden.

zh_tw.speaker: 貝拉納
zh_tw.message: 說她對玫瑰庭園很好奇

zh_cn.speaker: 貝拉納
zh_cn.message: 說她對玫瑰庭園很好奇

en.speaker: Velanna
en.message: Pathetic

ko.speaker: 벨라나
ko.message: 아야메는 전투 방식이 꽤 마음에 들어

en.speaker: Velanna
en.message: I like Ayame's fighting style.

zh_tw.speaker: 貝拉納
zh_tw.message: 我很喜歡綾織的戰鬥方式

zh_cn.speaker: 貝拉納
zh_cn.message: 我很喜歡綾織的戰鬥方式

en.speaker: Velanna
en.message: She's my type.

ko.speaker: 벨라나
ko.message: 그러고보니, 그 애도 평범한 애는 아닌 것 같더군

en.speaker: Velanna
en.message: She didn't seem like an ordinary girl either.

zh_tw.speaker: 貝拉納
zh_tw.message: 這麼看來，那個孩子好像也不是平凡的孩子啊

zh_cn.speaker: 貝拉納
zh_cn.message: 這麼看來，那個孩子好像也不是平凡的孩子啊

en.speaker: Velanna
en.message: Sometimes air around her changes…

en.speaker: Velanna
en.message: Do you know something?

en.speaker: Savior
en.message: What if you two become friends?

en.speaker: Savior
en.message: What if you two become friends?

en.speaker: Velanna
en.message: Why don't you get rid of your Everphone?

ko.speaker: 벨라나
ko.message: 내 장미 정원에는 꿀벌들이 많이 살아

en.speaker: Velanna
en.message: There are many bees living in my rose garden.

zh_tw.speaker: 貝拉納
zh_tw.message: 我的玫瑰庭園裡住著很多蜜蜂

zh_cn.speaker: 貝拉納
zh_cn.message: 我的玫瑰庭園裡住著很多蜜蜂

ko.speaker: 벨라나
ko.message:
이리저리 날면서 앵앵대기도 하고
거슬릴 때가 없는 건 아니지만…

en.speaker: Velanna
en.message:
They fly around and make a buzzing sound
and sometimes I get annoyed…

zh_tw.speaker: 貝拉納
zh_tw.message:
到處嗡嗡嗡地飛，
沒有一刻不令人反感的，不過…

zh_cn.speaker: 貝拉納
zh_cn.message:
到處嗡嗡嗡地飛，
沒有一刻不令人反感的，不過…

en.speaker: Velanna
en.message: But better them than you.

ko.speaker: 벨라나
ko.message: 하다못해 꿀벌은 장미의 번식을 돕기라도 하잖아?

en.speaker: Velanna
en.message: At least the bees help the roses grow.

zh_tw.speaker: 貝拉納
zh_tw.message: 至少蜜蜂還會幫助玫瑰的繁殖呢！

zh_cn.speaker: 貝拉納
zh_cn.message: 至少蜜蜂還會幫助玫瑰的繁殖呢！

ko.speaker: 벨라나
ko.message:
사실을 말했다고 
바로 또 기죽는 점도 눈에 거슬려

en.speaker: Velanna
en.message:
It's the truth. 
It also bothers me that you feel discouraged right away.

zh_tw.speaker: 貝拉納
zh_tw.message:
在我說了實話之後，
你馬上就又洩氣的模樣也讓人反感

zh_cn.speaker: 貝拉納
zh_cn.message:
在我說了實話之後，
你馬上就又洩氣的模樣也讓人反感

ko.speaker: 벨라나
ko.message:
좋아하는 시집이 있어
인간이 쓴 시였어

en.speaker: Velanna
en.message:
I have a book of poems
written by a human

zh_tw.speaker: 貝拉納
zh_tw.message:
我喜歡一部詩集，
是人類寫的詩

zh_cn.speaker: 貝拉納
zh_cn.message:
我喜歡一部詩集，
是人類寫的詩

ko.speaker: 벨라나
ko.message:
너랑 같은 종족 개체의 뇌로 썼다고는 
생각하기 어려울 만큼

en.speaker: Velanna
en.message:
It was written by an individual of your own race, 
something that I had found hard to believe,

zh_tw.speaker: 貝拉納
zh_tw.message:
很難想像
那是用跟你同種族個體的頭腦寫出來的

zh_cn.speaker: 貝拉納
zh_cn.message:
很難想像
那是用跟你同種族個體的頭腦寫出來的

en.speaker: Velanna
en.message: and it contained so much meaning.

zh_tw.speaker: 貝拉納
zh_tw.message: 其中蘊含了富有意義的內容

zh_cn.speaker: 貝拉納
zh_cn.message: 其中蘊含了富有意義的內容

en.speaker: Savior
en.message: I want to know so bad.

en.speaker: Savior
en.message: I want to know so bad.

ko.speaker: 벨라나
ko.message:
네가 원래 있던 과거 세계의 학교에서는
시를 공부했어?

en.speaker: Velanna
en.message:
In the school where you were from,
did you study poetry?

zh_tw.speaker: 貝拉納
zh_tw.message:
你在原本過去世界的學校裡
有學過詩嗎？

zh_cn.speaker: 貝拉納
zh_cn.message:
你在原本過去世界的學校裡
有學過詩嗎？

en.speaker: Velanna
en.message: Recommend something to me.

en.speaker: Velanna
en.message: If I like something, I'll tell you.

zh_tw.speaker: 貝拉納
zh_tw.message: 如果我滿意的話，就會告訴你的

zh_cn.speaker: 貝拉納
zh_cn.message: 如果我滿意的話，就會告訴你的

ko.speaker: 벨라나
ko.message: 그정도 노력은 해야지 않겠어. 안 그래?

en.speaker: Velanna
en.message: Don't you think you should at least try that? Right?

zh_tw.speaker: 貝拉納
zh_tw.message: 至少要有這種程度的努力，不是嗎？

zh_cn.speaker: 貝拉納
zh_cn.message: 至少要有這種程度的努力，不是嗎？

en.speaker: Velanna
en.message: I don't want to see you.

en.speaker: Velanna
en.message: I want you out of my sight.

zh_tw.speaker: 貝拉納
zh_tw.message: 我想把你從視線中清除掉

zh_cn.speaker: 貝拉納
zh_cn.message: 我想把你從視線中清除掉

en.speaker: Velanna
en.message: If possible, out of my head as well.

zh_tw.speaker: 貝拉納
zh_tw.message: 可以的話，也從我的腦海裡清除掉

zh_cn.speaker: 貝拉納
zh_cn.message: 可以的話，也從我的腦海裡清除掉

ko.speaker: 벨라나

수고롭지 않게 
네가 알아서 스스로 사라져 줘

en.speaker: Velanna
en.message:
Without troubling yourself too much, 
please get out of my sight on your own.

zh_tw.speaker: 貝拉納
zh_tw.message:
為了不要讓我太辛苦，
你自己看著辦，消失吧

zh_cn.speaker: 貝拉納
zh_cn.message:
為了不要讓我太辛苦，
你自己看著辦，消失吧

en.speaker: Velanna
en.message: Or…

en.message: When I think of you, I feel dry.

zh_tw.speaker: 貝拉納
zh_tw.message: 想到你就有種乾燥的感覺

zh_cn.speaker: 貝拉納
zh_cn.message: 想到你就有種乾燥的感覺

en.speaker: Velanna
en.message: My lips gets dry.

en.speaker: Velanna
en.message: And I don't know what to say.

en.speaker: Velanna
en.message: Still…

en.speaker: Velanna
en.message: Maybe we can meet again someday.

zh_tw.speaker: 貝拉納

zh_cn.speaker: 貝拉納
zh_cn.message: 總有一天可能會再見的吧

en.message: Hello

zh_cn.message: 用傻里傻氣的表情睡著了啊…

en.message: It's annoying.

en.message: You're curious about so many things.

zh_tw.speaker: 貝拉納
zh_tw.message: 你真的是充滿了無用的好奇心啊

zh_cn.speaker: 貝拉納
zh_cn.message: 你真的是充滿了無用的好奇心啊

en.speaker: Velanna

en.speaker: Savior
en.message: Velanna, would you like some cake?

en.message: Mephi brought it.

en.speaker: Savior
en.message: Mephi brought it.

en.speaker: Velanna
en.message: There's no way I would eat it…

en.message: I don't like anything sweet…

en.message: and I don't like you.

en.speaker: Velanna
en.message: I don't want to talk to you.

en.message: Velanna, what are you up to?

en.message: Velanna, what are you up to?

ko.message:
정말 짜증나.
네 말 한마디 한마디가…

en.speaker: Velanna
en.message:
So annoying.

zh_cn.speaker: 貝拉納

你一句又一句話…

en.speaker: Velanna

zh_tw.speaker: 貝拉納
